description: node:net event-driven async TCP over loopback: server.on('connection') + socket.on('data'/'end') fire on their own via the poll readiness pump wired into the event loop; client half-closes with end() and reads the reply. 事件按发生顺序收集、全部结束后按固定顺序打印——跨 fd 的到达次序是固有竞态(非被测语义),断言四类异步事件均真实触发且内容正确

expect.stdout:
server recv ping
server end
client recv reply:ping
client end
